recommended_medicine: Propiconazole 25 EC @ 0.1% (consult local agri officer for dose)
organic_solution: Spray neem oil extract (3%) and maintain balanced nutrition.
prevention_steps: Use rust-resistant wheat varieties.
Avoid late sowing.
Remove and destroy heavily infected plants.

recommended_medicine: Treat seed with Carboxin or Tebuconazole as per recommendation.
organic_solution: Use hot water seed treatment (soaking seeds in warm water) under expert guidance.
prevention_steps: Always use certified, disease-free seed.
Follow seed treatment before sowing.
Avoid saving seed from infected fields.

recommended_medicine: Tricyclazole 75 WP @ recommended dose (consult local expert).
organic_solution: Apply fermented buttermilk spray and maintain proper spacing.
prevention_steps: Avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer.
Maintain proper plant spacing and field drainage.
Use resistant varieties where available.

organic_solution: Use cow dung based jeevamrut sprays and avoid standing water for long.
prevention_steps: Use balanced fertilizer, avoid too much urea.
Do not allow water to move from infected to healthy fields.
Use disease-free seed and resistant varieties.

recommended_medicine: Mancozeb or similar fungicide as per recommendation.
organic_solution: Apply compost tea and maintain crop rotation.
prevention_steps: Use crop rotation with non-host crops.
Avoid water stress and nutrient deficiency.
Use resistant hybrids if available.

recommended_medicine: Apply recommended insecticide like Chlorantraniliprole (consult expert).
organic_solution: Use light traps and release Trichogramma parasitoids where available.
prevention_steps: Collect and destroy affected dead hearts.
Avoid continuous maize cropping on same field.
Use timely sowing and balanced fertilization.

recommended_medicine: Systemic fungicides like Metalaxyl + Mancozeb as per dose.
organic_solution: Use copper-based organic formulations and maintain good aeration.
prevention_steps: Avoid overhead irrigation in late evening.
Destroy infected plant debris after harvest.
Use certified, disease-free seed tubers.

organic_solution: Use neem oil spray and maintain adequate potassium nutrition.
prevention_steps: Remove lower infected leaves early.
Avoid stress and maintain balanced nutrients.
Follow crop rotation.

recommended_medicine: Control whitefly vector with recommended insecticides.
organic_solution: Use yellow sticky traps and neem oil sprays.
prevention_steps: Use virus-free seedlings.
Remove and destroy infected plants early.
Use net houses or mulches to reduce vector entry.

recommended_medicine: Seed treatment with Trichoderma and fungicides as advised.
organic_solution: Use Trichoderma enriched compost and well-drained soil.
prevention_steps: Avoid waterlogging in chickpea fields.
Use resistant varieties.
Do not grow chickpea repeatedly on same land.
